_comment: OPTIONAL multi-vault registry (gitignored). Atlas Kit is single-vault by default — just set VAULT_PATH in .env and you do NOT need this file. Copy to vaults.json only if you run more than one vault. Each KEY is the vault id used in API/MCP params (vault: 'atlas'); `path` is the vault's git checkout on the box; exactly one entry should set default:true (used when no vault is named). A vault whose checkout contains Wiki/Legend.md is auto-treated as a TYPED (queryable) Atlas. The vault keyed `atlas` additionally gets the agent-orchestrator MCP tools for its knowledge chat.
